info.name: HappyGo API
info.description: Complete API collection for HappyGo mobile application

request.description: Register a new user with name, email, and mobile number
Verify user email with token sent to email
Send OTP to user's mobile number for verification
Send OTP to user's mobile for login
Get current logged in user details
Get all bikes with pagination and sorting
Get bikes available for booking in a specific time period
Get details of a specific bike
Get all hotels with pagination and sorting
Get hotels available for booking in a specific time period
Get details of a specific hotel
Get all products with pagination, sorting and filtering
Get details of a specific product

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Choco Coffee",
    "description": "A mocha is typically based on the combination of an espresso and hot milk with added chocolate flavours.",
    "images": ["/images/products/choco-coffee.jpg"],
    "category": "Food",
    "price": {
        "basePrice": 852,
        "discountedPrice": 698.35
    },
    "stock": 100,
    "isAvailable": true,
    "isBestseller": true,
    "taxRate": 0.18
}

request.description: Create a new booking for bike or hotel
Get all bookings for the current user with filtering
Get details of a specific booking
Update the status of a booking
Upload required documents for bike booking
Get all orders for the current user with filtering

Update the status of an order
Get referral details for the current user
Mark a referral as completed (Admin only)
Get all places with filtering and pagination
Get details of a specific place
Get itinerary suggestions based on number of days
Create a payment order for booking
Create a payment order for product order
Get details of a specific employee

Assign an order to an employee
Get current logged in employee details
